## Samsung Begins Mass Production of PCIe 6.0 SSDs for AI Servers

Mass production of PCIe 6.0 SSDs is a concrete supply-chain signal that AI server storage specs are inflecting upward; positive read-through for storage component suppliers and AI datacenter build-out velocity.

- Samsung Electronics has commenced mass production of PCIe 6.0 SSDs, explicitly positioned for AI server workloads.
- This is a supply-side milestone for AI storage infrastructure, signaling an accelerating upgrade in server storage specifications.
- Samsung's move indicates AI datacenter buyers are already specifying next-generation storage bandwidth.
- High classifier confidence; direct read-through to AI infrastructure capex and advanced materials themes.
